PostToolUse.name: po-file-validation
PostToolUse.description: Remind about .po/.pot validation when a translation file is written or edited

hooks.message:
Check the file_path of the tool call. If the file ends in .po or .pot, remind the user:

[odoo-i18n] Translation file changed. Consider running:
- /odoo-i18n validate — check for syntax errors, encoding issues, and format specifier mismatches
- /odoo-i18n missing — find untranslated entries
- Load into Odoo: python -m odoo -c conf/project.conf -d db -u module --stop-after-init

If the file does NOT end in .po or .pot, say nothing about i18n — this hook is not relevant.

PostToolUse.name: i18n-general-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Brief i18n reminder when new Python, XML, JS, or SCSS files are created in an Odoo module

hooks.message:
[odoo-i18n] New file created. Quick i18n checklist:
- Python: use _('text') for runtime strings, _lt('text') for class-level
- XML: string= attributes are auto-translated (no _() needed)
- JS (16+): import { _t } from '@web/core/l10n/translation'
- SCSS: use CSS logical properties (margin-inline-start) for RTL support
- Run /odoo-i18n extract after adding translatable strings
